---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for CodexOS
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

> One-sentence description of the requested feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. How would it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other approaches or workarounds?

## Scope

- [ ] Alpine edition (`codexos-lite`)
- [ ] GUI edition (`codexos-lite-gui`)
- [ ] Debian compat (`codexos-compat`)
- [ ] Desktop edition (`codexos-desktop`)
- [ ] Docker container
- [ ] Build system / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any other information that would be helpful.
